api_key.description: Google PageSpeed API Key. See here. The key is optional - however the API is heavily rate limited when using without API Key. Creating and using the API key therefore is recommended. The key is case sensitive.

categories.description: Defines which Lighthouse category to run. One or many of: "accessibility", "best-practices", "performance", "pwa", "seo".

strategies.description: The analyses strategy to use. Either "desktop" or "mobile".

urls.description: The URLs to retrieve pagespeed information from. The connector will attempt to sync PageSpeed reports for all the defined URLs. Format: https://(www.)url.domain

base_url.description: Placeholder base URL used only to construct the engine runtime before the Tier-2 hook delegates to the legacy connector.

mode.description: Set to fixture for credential-free legacy fixture tests.
